item.title: Deploy Custom Object Detection using Flask & Python, Step by Step
item.description: The inference time of YOLO model with compare to the other models like EfficientDet and RetinaNet is better. YOLO is known for its speed for detecting the objects in image/video.

item.title: Anomaly detection with synthetic data - vision - PyTorch Forums
item.description: I’m working on a project in which I need to detect anomalies in a particular scene (two background scenes). The anomaly could be anything (bolts, pliers, glasses, etc.). However, I have generated synthetic data training with unity because I have very few realistic images and here...

item.title: OpenCV: Contours : More Functions
item.description: 1. Convexity Defects. We saw what is convex hull in second chapter about contours. Any deviation of the object from this hull can be considered as convexity defect. OpenCV comes with a ready-made function to find this, cv.convexityDefects(). A basic function call would look like below
